text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Pit, pat, pit, pat...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I have never faltered from my path as the
Overlord. It has always been up, to the peak of
the mountain and beyond.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Now I face a mountain range I've never
conquered before.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
It's the end of the year, and the Arima Kinen has
finally arrived! The crowd here is more excited
than ever for this dream match!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Old meets new in this pivotal clash! Our first
tried-and-true runner is...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
The biggest, the strongest, the highest! No one's
reachin' my plateau!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa, the Phantom Bird who flies higher
than the Andes.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
She's my generous benefactor who showed me
how a true ruler battles during this year's summer
camp.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: And our second contender...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
With grace, I seek a height of skill as great as Mt.
Fuji.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wonder, the cultural juggernaut hailing
from the United States. Her unwavering faith in
her abilities is the source of her composure.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
One of the twin peaks of the older generation—I
couldn't ask for a better obstacle to overcome.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
If memory serves, the highest mountain in
existence is 8,848 meters tall.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
And I shall supersede that height... by three
millimeters!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
You might scoff that practically anyone could go
an extra three meager millimeters. However!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Once surpassed, those three millimeters can never
again be overcome, not even in hundreds of
millions of years!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: And that... is the power of the Centurial Overlord!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Yeaaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Fwip!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And now, this year's most promising contender!
T.M. Opera O has arrived!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Ah! What presence...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: El emperador... The mighty monarch... Yep.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: She's not a king of merely comedy anymore!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
They each have their own fierce, daunting aura as
they boldly descend onto the grounds of the
Arima Kinen!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Now, Trainer, shall we fulfill that promise we
made the day we met?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Of course, you must know how this final scene will
play out.
choice_data_list: With you being crowned the Centurial Overlord!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Precisely. It will mark the dawning of a new age.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: One with me, the Centurial Overlord, at its focus.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Opera O...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Opera O...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Doto, Ayabe... Watch me now.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Watch me as I take to the fertile fields of
Nakayama with saber in hand and forever
engrave our generation's mark for all to see.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Today, I am a challenger no more.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I am the one who shall bring an end to the old,
crumbling age! Come at me, o beloved heroes of
the bygone era!
